captures.purpose: Discoverable robot API schema; primary contract for ntm adapter.
Unified state: sessions + beads_summary + agent_mail + tools.
Token-efficient TOON projection of robot-snapshot for replay tests that compare both encodings.
Build pedigree (version/commit/build_date/go_version/os/arch); pinned in adapter probe.
Compact session/agent/alert summary surfaced in the daemon health endpoint.
Tool inventory + per-tool health probe — feeds the daemon /v1/capabilities tool registry.
Agent Mail messages snapshot keyed by project.
Mail health/check probe; success=false in this scenario because no mail server is locally bound at capture time.
Alert stream; closest equivalent to the user-listed --robot-attention which does not exist in ntm 1.8.0.

substitutions.--robot-events: no direct equivalent; --robot-history requires a session arg, --robot-replay also session-scoped — captured neither (defer until we have a session)
substitutions.--robot-attention: captured --robot-alerts which exposes the same alert-state surface used by attention/label-attention

drift.notes: Scenario captured against a fresh VPS (no ntm sessions, no .beads/ in /home/admin). active and failure scenarios are deferred until a session is provisioned (see follow-up bead in close note).
